title: BHAGA Analytics
description: 8-section dashboard: Pipeline Health (top), Daily Sales, Weekly Sales, Labor (daily+weekly), Order Quality, Payroll, Labor Forecast. Powered by BQ views from migrations 004+005+016.

list.name: kds_date
list.label: KDS: Order Date
list.definition:
SELECT CAST(date_local AS STRING) AS value
FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_kds_order_investigation`
GROUP BY date_local
ORDER BY (date_local = (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (SELECT MAX(run_date) FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.pipeline_runs` WHERE status = 'success'),
    (SELECT MAX(date_local) FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_kds_order_investigation`)
  )
)) DESC, date_local DESC

query.rawSql:
SELECT CAST(date_local AS STRING) AS value
FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_kds_order_investigation`
GROUP BY date_local
ORDER BY (date_local = (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (SELECT MAX(run_date) FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.pipeline_runs` WHERE status = 'success'),
    (SELECT MAX(date_local) FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_kds_order_investigation`)
  )
)) DESC, date_local DESC

list.description: Order date shown in the Order KDS Times table. Defaults to the most recent completed incremental run date. Pick another date from the dropdown to inspect a specific day.

list.name: kds_min_per_item
list.label: KDS: Min / Item ≥
list.description: Default slow-order threshold for the Order KDS Times table; rows below this Min/Item are hidden. Lower it (e.g. 0) to see all orders.

list.name: kds_source
list.label: KDS: Order Source
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT order_source AS value FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.square_kds_tickets` WHERE order_source IS NOT NULL ORDER BY order_source

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT order_source AS value FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.square_kds_tickets` WHERE order_source IS NOT NULL ORDER BY order_source

list.description: Filter the KDS p95 chart to one or more order sources (Per Diem / Uber Eats / Point of Sale / …). Defaults to All.

list.name: goal_hours_per_item
list.label: Goal: Shift Hrs / Item
list.description: Target shift hours per item as a raw ratio (0.20) — the Hours / Item charts display it percent-style (× 100), so 0.20 shows as 20%

list.name: goal_labor_pct_of_net_sales
list.label: Goal: Labor Wages / Net Sales
list.description: Target labor wages as a fraction of net sales (labor_cost ÷ net_sales, e.g. 0.20 = 20%) — rendered as a baseline line on the Weekly Labor Wages / Net Sales chart

list.name: goal_kds_p95_min
list.label: Goal: KDS p95 (min)
list.description: Target p95 per-order KDS prep time in minutes; drawn as a dashed baseline on the KDS Time per Item chart.

panels.title: Pipeline Runs
panels.description: Last 30 nightly daily_refresh outcomes, newest first. Model path: materialize_model_bq (BQ canonical) → BQ-internal verify. No Sheet projection steps (render_raw_sheets / render_model_sheet_from_bq deleted post-Sheets-exit). recovery_retrigger=TRUE means scrape/OTP was skipped and the model was recomputed because BQ data was already present from a prior partial run. Status: success | failed | halted | otp_pending.

targets.rawSql: SELECT run_id, FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M', started_at_utc, 'America/Chicago') AS run_time_ct, status, COALESCE(failed_step, '') AS failed_step, COALESCE(error, '') AS error, COALESCE(recovery_retrigger, FALSE) AS recovery_retrigger FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_pipeline_runs` ORDER BY started_at_utc DESC

panels.title: Data Source Pulls
panels.description: Last 50 per-source pull attempts (square / adp / google_reviews), newest first. Only attempted pulls are recorded — sources skipped via step markers or recovery retriggers (BQ data already present) do not appear. That empty pull list on a recovery_retrigger run is expected, not a gap.

targets.rawSql: SELECT run_id, source, FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M', started_at_utc, 'America/Chicago') AS pull_time_ct, status, COALESCE(error, '') AS error FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_source_pulls` ORDER BY started_at_utc DESC
SELECT TIMESTAMP(date, 'America/Chicago') AS time, orders AS `Orders`, items_sold AS `Items Sold` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_labor_daily` WHERE date >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY date

panels.title: Weekly Order & Item Volume
panels.description: Each bar is one full week (Mon–Sun), labeled by its date range (e.g. '6/1-6/7') so the period a bar covers is explicit. Orders on the left axis, Items Sold on the right. Solid fill.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CONCAT(CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM week_start) AS STRING), '/', CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM week_start) AS STRING), '-', CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM DATE_ADD(week_start, INTERVAL 6 DAY)) AS STRING), '/', CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM DATE_ADD(week_start, INTERVAL 6 DAY)) AS STRING)) AS `Week`, orders AS `Orders`, items_sold AS `Items Sold` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_labor_weekly` WHERE week_start >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY week_start

SELECT TIMESTAMP(date, 'America/Chicago') AS time, total_hours AS `Total`, hourly_hours AS `Part-time`, fulltime_hours AS `Full-time` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_labor_daily` WHERE date >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY date

panels.title: Daily Labor Wages / Net Sales (total / part-time / full-time)
panels.description: Labor wages (shift hours × wage rate) as a share of net sales, split by total / part-time / full-time. Total = all labor; Part-time = hourly staff; Full-time = salaried/full-time staff. Lower is leaner. Shown as a percent (e.g. 35% = labor costs 35¢ per $1 of net sales). Non-positive-sales days are blanked. Dashed line = goal ($goal_labor_pct_of_net_sales).

targets.rawSql: SELECT TIMESTAMP(date, 'America/Chicago') AS time, SAFE_DIVIDE(total_labor_cost, NULLIF(GREATEST(net_sales, 0), 0)) AS `Total`, SAFE_DIVIDE(hourly_labor_cost, NULLIF(GREATEST(net_sales, 0), 0)) AS `Part-time`, SAFE_DIVIDE(fulltime_labor_cost, NULLIF(GREATEST(net_sales, 0), 0)) AS `Full-time`, CAST('$goal_labor_pct_of_net_sales' AS FLOAT64) AS `Goal` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_labor_daily` WHERE date >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY date

panels.title: Daily Hours / Item (total / part-time / full-time)
panels.description: Shift hours per item sold, split by total / part-time / full-time, shown percent-style (value × 100, e.g. 0.15 h/item displays as 15%). Lower is leaner. Dashed line = goal ($goal_hours_per_item).

targets.rawSql: SELECT TIMESTAMP(date, 'America/Chicago') AS time, hours_per_item AS `Total`, hourly_hours_per_item AS `Part-time`, fulltime_hours_per_item AS `Full-time`, CAST('$goal_hours_per_item' AS FLOAT64) AS `Goal` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_labor_daily` WHERE date >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY date

panels.title: Weekly Shift Hours
panels.description: Total / part-time / full-time shift hours per week. Each point is plotted at the week-ENDING date (Sunday), so a '6/7' tick = the Mon–Sun week ending 6/7.

targets.rawSql: SELECT TIMESTAMP(week_end, 'America/Chicago') AS time, total_hours AS `Total`, hourly_hours AS `Part-time`, fulltime_hours AS `Full-time` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_labor_weekly` WHERE week_start >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY week_start

panels.title: Weekly Labor Wages / Net Sales (total / part-time / full-time)
panels.description: Labor wages (shift hours × wage rate) as a share of net sales, split by total / part-time / full-time. Total = all labor; Part-time = hourly staff; Full-time = salaried/full-time staff. Lower is leaner. Shown as a percent (e.g. 35% = labor costs 35¢ per $1 of net sales). Non-positive-sales weeks are blanked. Dashed line = goal ($goal_labor_pct_of_net_sales). Each point is plotted at the week-ENDING date (Sunday), so a '6/7' tick = the Mon–Sun week ending 6/7.

targets.rawSql: SELECT TIMESTAMP(week_end, 'America/Chicago') AS time, SAFE_DIVIDE(total_labor_cost, NULLIF(GREATEST(net_sales, 0), 0)) AS `Total`, SAFE_DIVIDE(hourly_labor_cost, NULLIF(GREATEST(net_sales, 0), 0)) AS `Part-time`, SAFE_DIVIDE(fulltime_labor_cost, NULLIF(GREATEST(net_sales, 0), 0)) AS `Full-time`, CAST('$goal_labor_pct_of_net_sales' AS FLOAT64) AS `Goal` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_labor_weekly` WHERE week_start >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY week_start

panels.title: Weekly Hours / Item (total / part-time / full-time)
panels.description: Shift hours per item sold, split by total / part-time / full-time, shown percent-style (value × 100, e.g. 0.15 h/item displays as 15%). Lower is leaner. Dashed line = goal ($goal_hours_per_item). Each point is plotted at the week-ENDING date (Sunday), so a '6/7' tick = the Mon–Sun week ending 6/7.

targets.rawSql: SELECT TIMESTAMP(week_end, 'America/Chicago') AS time, hours_per_item AS `Total`, hourly_hours_per_item AS `Part-time`, fulltime_hours_per_item AS `Full-time`, CAST('$goal_hours_per_item' AS FLOAT64) AS `Goal` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_labor_weekly` WHERE week_start >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY week_start

panels.title: KDS p95 Time per Item by Source
panels.description: p95 of per-ITEM prep time (order completion time ÷ items) per day, one line per order source ($kds_source). Dashed line = p95 goal ($goal_kds_p95_min min). Y-axis capped at 30 min.

targets.rawSql: SELECT TIMESTAMP(date, 'America/Chicago') AS time, order_source AS metric, kds_p95_min AS value FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_kds_order_quality_by_source_daily` WHERE date >= DATE('$date_from') AND order_source IN (${kds_source:singlequote}) UNION ALL SELECT TIMESTAMP(date, 'America/Chicago') AS time, 'p95 Goal' AS metric, CAST('$goal_kds_p95_min' AS FLOAT64) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT date FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_kds_order_quality_by_source_daily` WHERE date >= DATE('$date_from')) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Order KDS Times — set your slow threshold with the Min / Item filter
panels.description: One row per order (ticket) with its whole-order KDS prep time (Start → End). Defaults to the most-recent order date and Min/Item ≥ 8 — adjust both with the 'KDS: Order Date', 'KDS: Min / Item ≥', and 'KDS: Order Source' inputs at the top of the dashboard. After typing a new Min/Item threshold, press Enter (or click away) to apply it. If results still look wrong, clear any column filter you may have set on the 'Min / Item' column header (the top input and the in-table column filter are independent). 'Min / Item' = Order Min ÷ Items. 'On Shift (punched in)' = everyone whose ADP punch overlapped that order's time window. 'Items in Order' lists every item with its quantity (e.g. '2x Build Your Own BOWL; 1x …'). KDS times are per-order.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_local, ticket_name, order_source, start_time, end_time, num_items, order_min, ROUND(order_min / num_items, 1) AS min_per_item, (SELECT STRING_AGG(DISTINCT s.employee, ' | ' ORDER BY s.employee) FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_staff_on_shift` s WHERE s.date = o.date_local AND SAFE.PARSE_TIME('%H:%M', s.in_time) <= SAFE.PARSE_TIME('%H:%M:%S', o.end_time) AND SAFE.PARSE_TIME('%H:%M', s.out_time) >= SAFE.PARSE_TIME('%H:%M:%S', o.start_time)) AS staff_on_shift, items_in_ticket FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_kds_order_investigation` o WHERE date_local = '$kds_date' AND order_source IN (${kds_source:singlequote}) AND ROUND(order_min / num_items, 1) >= $kds_min_per_item ORDER BY min_per_item DESC, ticket_name

panels.title: Payroll — per Employee per Pay Period
panels.description: Each pay component is shown as a Calculated / ADP / Diff triad. Calculated = our model; ADP = what ADP actually paid; Diff = Calculated − ADP (positive means we computed more than ADP paid). Hourly Pay = hours × wage rate; Tip Pay = allocated tips; Review Bonus = earned review bonus; Total Pay = Hourly + Tip + Bonus. So 'Diff Review Bonus' is our review bonus minus ADP's bonus line, and 'Calculated Total Pay' is the sum of the three calculated components.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(period_start AS STRING) period_start, CAST(period_end AS STRING) period_end, employee, hours_worked, est_gross_pay, adp_wages_paid, wage_diff, tips_allocated, adp_tips_paid, tip_diff, review_bonus, adp_bonus_paid, bonus_diff, est_total_pay, adp_total_paid, ROUND(est_total_pay - adp_total_paid, 2) AS total_diff FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_payroll_period` WHERE period_start >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY period_start DESC, employee

panels.title: Training Shifts (current)
panels.description: Operator-marked training shifts (per-shift tip-pool exclusions). Edited only via /bhaga-cloud training set|rm — BQ is the source of truth (no Sheet). One row per (employee, date).

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(date AS STRING) date, employee_name, note, FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M', updated_at, 'America/Chicago') AS updated_at, updated_by FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_training_shifts` ORDER BY date DESC, employee_name

panels.title: Google Reviews accounted for in Payroll
panels.description: One row per review that generated a bonus (total_bonus > 0). Pool mode (post 2026-06-08): per_employee_bonus = equal share of the $20 pool among non-excluded in-hours staff. Legacy mode (before 2026-06-08): per_employee_bonus = total_bonus / member_count. Source: vw_review_bonus_detail (migration 026).

targets.rawSql: SELECT post_ts_ct, post_date_ct, reviewer, rating, comment, employees_considered, member_count, per_employee_bonus, total_bonus, shift_date_credited, shift_assignment_reason, review_url FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_review_bonus_detail` WHERE post_date_ct >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY post_ts_ct DESC

panels.title: Labor Forecast — next 30 days
panels.description: Daily forecast (today + next 30 days): Day-of-week, Forecast Orders/Items, Prior-Week comparison (actual@-7d, falling back to forecast@-7d when last week failed/was an ongoing day), % change vs prior week, Goal Total Hours (Forecast Items × $goal_hours_per_item; covers part-time + the one full-time employee), Scheduled Part Time (ADP scheduled hours, current + next week only, excludes the full-time employee; blank beyond), and the Scheduled-PT minus Goal-Total gap (absolute hrs and %; note this compares part-time scheduled against the total goal). Override forecast_exclude on the labor_daily BQ tab to flag anomaly days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date, dow, forecast_orders, forecast_items, prior_wk_orders, prior_wk_items, orders_vs_prior_wk, items_vs_prior_wk, ROUND(forecast_items * CAST('$goal_hours_per_item' AS FLOAT64), 1) AS goal_shift_hours, scheduled_hours, ROUND(scheduled_hours - forecast_items * CAST('$goal_hours_per_item' AS FLOAT64), 1) AS sched_vs_goal_hours, SAFE_DIVIDE(scheduled_hours - forecast_items * CAST('$goal_hours_per_item' AS FLOAT64), NULLIF(forecast_items * CAST('$goal_hours_per_item' AS FLOAT64), 0)) AS sched_vs_goal_pct FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_forecast` ORDER BY date

panels.title: Goal Total Hours vs Scheduled Part Time
panels.description: Daily labor target vs ADP Team Schedule part-time hours (current + next week only; excludes the one full-time employee). Goal Total Hours = forecast_items × $goal_hours_per_item (same as the forecast table; covers part-time + full-time). Goal updates on each nightly forecast rebuild for upcoming days; past dates freeze at the last stored forecast row. Scheduled Part Time is blank beyond the ADP scrape horizon.

targets.rawSql: SELECT TIMESTAMP(date, 'America/Chicago') AS time, ROUND(forecast_items * CAST('$goal_hours_per_item' AS FLOAT64), 1) AS `Goal Total Hours`, scheduled_hours AS `Scheduled Part Time` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_forecast` ORDER BY date

panels.title: Forecast vs Actual — Orders
panels.description: Order forecast (today + next 30 days) with actuals overlaid through the most recent completed day. Dashed line = forecast; solid = actual (ends where data stops).

targets.rawSql: SELECT TIMESTAMP(f.date, 'America/Chicago') AS time, f.forecast_orders AS `Forecast Orders`, IF(a.orders > 0, a.orders, NULL) AS `Actual Orders` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.model_forecast_daily` f LEFT JOIN `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_labor_daily` a ON a.date = f.date WHERE f.date >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY f.date

panels.title: Forecast vs Actual — Items
panels.description: Item forecast (today + next 30 days) with actuals overlaid through the most recent completed day. Dashed line = forecast; solid = actual (ends where data stops).

targets.rawSql: SELECT TIMESTAMP(f.date, 'America/Chicago') AS time, f.forecast_items AS `Forecast Items`, IF(a.orders > 0, a.items_sold, NULL) AS `Actual Items` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.model_forecast_daily` f LEFT JOIN `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_model_labor_daily` a ON a.date = f.date WHERE f.date >= DATE('$date_from') ORDER BY f.date

panels.title: Forecast Inputs / Exclusions
panels.description: Recent input days the forecaster saw (last 60 days). Rows with forecast_exclude=TRUE were dropped from the forecast seed averages — either auto-detected outliers (including low-AOV / comped days) or operator-overridden. Net Sales and AOV columns help spot promo / comped days where order count was normal but revenue was anomalously low. To override: set forecast_exclude=TRUE on the model_labor_daily BQ row for the anomaly day.

properties.value: Net Sales Δ vs Prev Wk

targets.rawSql: SELECT date, dow, orders, prev_wk_orders, orders_vs_prev_wk, items_sold, prev_wk_items, items_vs_prev_wk, net_sales, prev_wk_net_sales, net_sales_vs_prev_wk, aov, prev_wk_aov, forecast_exclude, outlier_reason, forecast_exclude_reason FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_forecast_exclusions` ORDER BY date DESC

panels.title: Base Inventory — Daily Closing Stock (tubs per base)
panels.description: Each line is one HQ base from the daily ClickUp closing form. Source: vw_inventory_base_latest_daily.

targets.rawSql: SELECT  TIMESTAMP(submitted_date, 'America/Chicago') AS time,  MAX(CASE WHEN item = 'Açaí'     THEN quantity_units END) AS `Açaí`,  MAX(CASE WHEN item = 'Coconut'  THEN quantity_units END) AS `Coconut`,  MAX(CASE WHEN item = 'Tropical' THEN quantity_units END) AS `Tropical`,  MAX(CASE WHEN item = 'Mango'    THEN quantity_units END) AS `Mango`,  MAX(CASE WHEN item = 'Pitaya'   THEN quantity_units END) AS `Pitaya`,  MAX(CASE WHEN item = 'Matcha'   THEN quantity_units END) AS `Matcha`,  MAX(CASE WHEN item = 'Ube'      THEN quantity_units END) AS `Ube`,  MAX(CASE WHEN item = 'Pog'      THEN quantity_units END) AS `Pog` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_inventory_base_latest_daily` WHERE store = 'palmetto'   AND submitted_date >= DATE('$date_from')   AND parse_ok = TRUE GROUP BY submitted_date ORDER BY submitted_date

panels.title: Order Assistant — Base Inventory Analytics
panels.description: Per-base: current stock, last restock, last-7-eligible-weekday-days usage (downward-only; restock/gap/closed days excluded), days remaining, days considered with per-day consumed amount, and recent exclusion reasons.

targets.rawSql: SELECT item AS Item, current_qty AS `Current Qty`, reported AS Reported, CAST(last_restock_date AS STRING) AS `Last Restock`, usage_7d_total AS `Usage 7d`, avg_daily_usage AS `Avg per day`, days_left AS `Days Left`, days_considered AS `Days Considered`, excluded_days AS Exclusions FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.vw_inventory_order_assistant` WHERE store = 'palmetto' ORDER BY current_qty DESC
